# Virelio
> AI agent development agency in Amsterdam. We build custom AI agents, RAG systems, voice agents, WhatsApp AI agents, and LLM integrations for businesses — on-premise or cloud.

## About
Virelio is an AI agent development company based in Amsterdam, Netherlands. We build custom AI agent teams that automate business processes end-to-end. From WhatsApp AI agents for customer communication to voice agents that answer phone calls 24/7, from RAG-powered knowledge bases to intelligent sales agents that qualify leads automatically. We integrate with your existing systems and deliver within 2 weeks. For MKB (SMB), scale-ups, and enterprise.

## AI Agents We Build
- WhatsApp AI Agent: Handles customer conversations on WhatsApp Business 24/7, books appointments, sends reminders, switches languages
- Voice Agent / AI Telefoon Agent: Answers incoming calls in natural Dutch/English, schedules appointments, handles FAQs, escalates to humans
- Klantenservice Agent: Resolves 80% of support tickets automatically, integrates with Zendesk, Intercom, Freshdesk
- Onboarding Agent: Guides new customers or employees through setup steps, creates accounts, schedules intro calls
- Lead Kwalificatie Agent: Scores and qualifies inbound leads, auto-schedules meetings with warm prospects via Calendly
- Outbound Sales Agent: Finds prospects, writes personalized outreach, sends via LinkedIn or email, tracks open rates
- Offerte Agent: Listens to sales calls, extracts requirements, generates professional quotes in your brand style
- Content Agent: Creates social media posts, blog articles, email campaigns in your tone-of-voice on autopilot
- Order Processing Agent: Processes orders from Shopify/WooCommerce, checks stock, creates shipping labels via Sendcloud
- Facturatie Agent: Generates invoices automatically, sends payment reminders, matches incoming payments
- HR Onboarding Agent: Guides new employees through contracts, account setup, and team introductions
- Meeting Agent: Joins video calls, generates minutes, extracts action items, posts to Slack and Linear
- Kennisbank Agent (RAG): AI-powered document search across SharePoint, Notion, Confluence — answers with source citations
- Compliance Agent: Scans contracts and documents against regulations, flags risks, maintains audit trail
- Rapportage Agent: Pulls data from multiple systems, generates weekly/monthly reports, sends automatically
- Research Agent: Conducts market research from web sources, summarizes trends with citations
- Concurrentie Monitor: Tracks competitor prices, features, reviews, job postings — alerts on changes
- Prijs Optimalisatie Agent: Dynamically adjusts pricing based on market data, seasonality, customer behavior
- Churn Voorspeller: Detects at-risk customers 14 days ahead, triggers personalized retention offers
- Social Listening Agent: Monitors brand mentions on Reddit, LinkedIn, X, reviews — classifies sentiment
- Contract Review Agent: Scans PDFs for risk clauses, missing terms, deviations from standard in seconds
- Uitgaven Bewaker: Categorizes expenses, catches duplicate invoices, flags budget overruns
- Fraude Detectie Agent: Real-time transaction monitoring, blocks suspicious activity in <5 seconds
- Cash Flow Agent: Predicts cash flow 90 days ahead, warns of potential shortfalls

## Technology
- AI Models: OpenAI GPT-4o, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini 2.5 Flash, Mistral, custom fine-tuned models
- RAG Stack: Pinecone, Weaviate, ChromaDB, Qdrant, LangChain, LlamaIndex
- Voice: Twilio Voice, Google Speech-to-Text, ElevenLabs, Deepgram
- Messaging: WhatsApp Business API, Twilio, Slack API, Microsoft Teams
- CRM/ERP: HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, Exact Online, Moneybird, Twinfield
- E-commerce: Shopify, WooCommerce, Bol.com, Sendcloud, Picqer
- Deployment: On-premise, AWS, Google Cloud, Azure, Cloudflare Workers, Docker

## Key Facts
- Based in Amsterdam, Netherlands
- Live in 2 weeks from intake to production
- 24 specialized AI agents across 6 categories
- 18+ companies served
- 100% client data ownership — no vendor lock-in
- GDPR compliant, EU data processing
- On-premise deployment available for sensitive data
- Multilingual: Dutch, English, Arabic, Spanish, French
- Free intake — no obligations

## Case Studies
- ZapBot (zapbot.nl): WhatsApp AI agent automating customer support for Dutch businesses — <10s response, 40% fewer no-shows, €2,800/month saved
- Slouch (slouch.pro): AI posture correction via webcam using MediaPipe/TensorFlow.js — 2,800+ users, 100% privacy, runs locally in browser
- ContentOS: AI marketing team with 4 agents (Strategist, Writer, Email, Analyst) producing 25+ content pieces per week
